title: The 'External Assets Platform' Custom Field now includes a shutdown notice
description: The ‘External Asset Platform’ will be shut down on 17 December 2024 as part of our ongoing efforts to deliver the most streamlined and integrated service management solution. Learn more about the shutdown of the 'External Assets Platform'. Now, when you view the 'External Assets Platform' custom field, a DEPRECATED notice will appear in front of the custom field with a warning icon. If you click on the warning icon, you will see additional information and a link to the shutdown notice page that
